admin.listings.delete_listing.warning: Warning: This permanently deletes the listing and its activity log entries. Its {count, plural, one {1 attendee} other {{count} attendees}} will be unlinked from this listing rather than deleted — their attendee records and any payments are kept, and any bookings on other listings are unaffected.
admin.listings.delete_listing.confirm_pr: To delete this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:

admin.listings.deactivate_listing.effect: Return a 404 error on the public ticket page
admin.listings.deactivate_listing.existi: Existing attendees will not be affected.
admin.listings.deactivate_listing.confir: To deactivate this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:
admin.listings.reactivate_listing.messag: Reactivating this listing will make it available for registrations again.
admin.listings.reactivate_listing.detail: The public ticket page will be accessible and new attendees can register.
admin.listings.reactivate_listing.confir: To reactivate this listing, type its name "{name}" into the box below:
admin.attendees.delete_warning: Warning: This will permanently remove this attendee from the listing and delete any associated payment records.

admin.attendees.delete_confirm: To delete this attendee, you must type their name "{name}" into the box below:
admin.attendees.release_bookings: Release their bookings into the pool
admin.attendees.release_bookings_note: Leave checked to subtract this attendee from listing running totals, making standard and purchase-page places available again. Uncheck to keep those totals unchanged.
admin.attendees.refund_warning: Warning: This will issue a full refund for this attendee's payment. The attendee will remain registered.
admin.attendees.refund_confirm: To refund this attendee, you must type their name "{name}" into the box below:
admin.attendees.refund_all_warning: Warning: This will issue a full refund for all {count} attendee(s) with payments. Attendees will remain registered.
admin.attendees.refund_all_confirm: To refund all attendees, you must type the listing name "{name}" into the box below:
admin.attendees.resend_note: Note: This will re-send the registration notification for this attendee.

admin.ledger.add.option.attendee_payment: Use for cash, bank transfer, a separate card machine, vouchers, or another payment system.
Extra amount this attendee needs to pay
Use for damage charges, late fees, rental extensions, deposits to collect later, or other customer debts not tied to a listing.
admin.ledger.add.option.attendee_writeof: Waive or reduce what this attendee owes
Use for goodwill credits, waived balances, small underpayments you will not chase, or corrected customer debt.
admin.ledger.add.option.listing_income.h: Use for invoice payments, door takings, bank transfers, shop-till sales, or rental payments handled outside this site.
admin.ledger.add.option.listing_cost.hin: Use for venue hire, equipment repair or replacement, delivery, staff, supplies, refunds handled elsewhere, or other listing-specific costs.
Use when an add-on, fee, upgrade, or rental extra was charged outside checkout.
admin.ledger.add.option.modifier_reducti: Use when a discount, waived add-on, corrected surcharge, or modifier-specific cost should reduce this modifier's total.
